mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_CATEGORY_NO AS "boardCategory", BOARD_CATEGORY FROM BOARD_TYPE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_POST B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE B.BOARD_DELETE = 'N'
AND B.BOARD_CD_NO IN (2, 3)
AND B.BOARD_CD_NO = #{boardCdNo}
AND
B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' M.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' (B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_POST ( BOARD_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_CD_NO, USER_NO, VIEW_COUNT, BOARD_DATE, BOARD_DELETE ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardCdNo}, #{userNo}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_NAME AS boardWriter, B.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, B.BOARD_DATE AS boardDate, B.BOARD_CD_NO AS boardCdNo FROM BOARD_POST B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.BOARD_DELETE = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY ( REPLY_NO, BOARD_NO, USER_NO, REPLY_CONTENT, REPLY_DATE, REPLY_DELETE ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPLY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{userNo}, #{replyContent}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND REPLY_DELETE = 'N'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT R.REPLY_NO, R.BOARD_NO, R.USER_NO, R.REPLY_CONTENT, R.REPLY_DATE, M.USER_NAME FROM REPLY R JOIN MEMBER M ON (R.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE R.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND R.REPLY_DELETE = 'N' ORDER BY R.REPLY_NO DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
mapper.update:
UPDATE BOARD_IMG SET IMG_LEVEL = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_IMG_NO IN
#{imgNo}
